---
title: "Option C — Clinical Trial Access Gap: Trial Site Density vs Disease Burden"
author: ""
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    self-contained: true
---

## Introduction

## Data Sources

- **ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API**: trial locations, phase, status, sponsor type, eligibility text
- **CDC PLACES (Socrata API)**: county/state-level disease burden estimates
- **US Census ACS** (optional): SES covariates to explain mismatch

## Methods

### Data Acquisition

### Mismatch Index Construction

## EDA

### Trial Site Counts per 100k

### Burden Estimates with Confidence Intervals

### Mismatch Index Maps and Ranked Lists

## Preliminary Modeling

## Limitations

## Conclusion and Final-Project Plan
